# Archetype Original

> Archetype Original is a servant leadership advisory and Culture Science practice founded by Bart Paden, based in Carthage, Missouri. Private advisory for founders and executives, a leadership diagnostic called ALI, three books, a daily journal, and a 365-day servant leadership devotional series.

Bart Paden spent 33 years building companies, including Midwestern Interactive, which he grew from a home office to more than 100 people before its acquisition in 2022. His core claim: if you grow people, you grow the organization. If you use people, you lose the organization. Everything on this site comes from that work.

## Key terms this site defines

- ALI (Archetype Leadership Index): a leadership diagnostic that measures the seven conditions people work inside every day: Clarity, Communication, Consistency, Trust, Alignment, Stability, and Drift. It measures conditions, not sentiment. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/culture-science/ali
- Culture Science: a discipline combining behavioral research with lived organizational experience. The research foundation behind ALI. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/culture-science
- Drift: the early warning signal that leadership conditions are quietly eroding before results show it.
- Scoreboard Leadership: when leadership becomes a game to win instead of a mission to serve. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/culture-science/scoreboard-leadership
- The Bad Leader Project: anonymous, neutralized stories of leadership dysfunction and leadership health, published for pattern visibility. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/culture-science/bad-leader-project

## Services

- Leadership Advisory: private, one-to-one advisory for founders and executives. One room, outside the system, no consequence. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/advisory
- Consulting: https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/consulting
- Fractional Leadership: C-suite fractional roles. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/fractional-roles

## Books by Bart Paden

- The Room: on the structural limits of honest feedback inside authority. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/the-room
- Accidental CEO: a leadership story about building something real and choosing to lead when the weight shows up before the clarity does. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/accidental-ceo
- Remaining Human: servant leadership, clarity, and staying human while AI reshapes work. https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/remaining-human

## Content

- Journal (essays on leadership, published continuously): https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/journal
- Servant Leadership Devotional Series (daily): https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faith
- FAQs, 148 questions with full answers: https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs
- FAQ categories: https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/culture-science , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/ali , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/philosophy , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/methods , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/meet-archy , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/engagement , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/accidental-ceo , https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/faqs/meet-bart
- Meet Bart: https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/meet-bart
- Archy, an AI trained on Bart's full corpus: https://www.archetypeoriginal.com/archy
